extracted_claims: Real-rate moves can affect valuation-sensitive sectors more than the broad market.
a4ae517d-7c46-4de0-9639-aac215813337.methodology_summary: Empirical macro-finance framing using historical yield and asset-return relationships.
a4ae517d-7c46-4de0-9639-aac215813337.relevance_to_hypothesis: Directly relevant to Investigate semis versus defensives..
a4ae517d-7c46-4de0-9639-aac215813337.summary: Falling real yields tend to support duration-sensitive equity segments, though the effect is regime-dependent.
a4ae517d-7c46-4de0-9639-aac215813337.title: Real-rate sensitivity of long-duration assets

extracted_claims: Announcement effects are strongest when the surprise component is large.
aaa07709-c364-4d15-9e7e-bb2eb3e7ba35.methodology_summary: Event-study style measurement around announcement dates.
aaa07709-c364-4d15-9e7e-bb2eb3e7ba35.relevance_to_hypothesis: Relevant if the hypothesis is framed around CPI prints, labor releases, or other event windows.
aaa07709-c364-4d15-9e7e-bb2eb3e7ba35.summary: Event-style reactions to macro releases exist, but persistence and sign can vary with the prevailing regime and expectations backdrop.
aaa07709-c364-4d15-9e7e-bb2eb3e7ba35.title: Macro announcement effects are short horizon and noisy across regimes

extracted_claims: Macro interpretation matters as much as the raw data direction.
c94b39c0-677c-4fc9-8cb4-f66371bbe5d5.methodology_summary: Cross-market commentary supported by historical sector-relative performance comparisons.
c94b39c0-677c-4fc9-8cb4-f66371bbe5d5.relevance_to_hypothesis: Useful counterweight because it highlights conditional interpretation rather than a one-way macro rule.
c94b39c0-677c-4fc9-8cb4-f66371bbe5d5.source: Sell-side or public market strategy research
c94b39c0-677c-4fc9-8cb4-f66371bbe5d5.summary: Cooling inflation alone is often insufficient; growth-sensitive outperformance depends on whether the market reads the move as benign easing rather than growth deterioration.
c94b39c0-677c-4fc9-8cb4-f66371bbe5d5.title: Sector rotation depends on growth expectations as well as inflation cooling

caveats.detail: Sector composition effects may confound style interpretation.
caveats.label: hypothesis_caveat

caveats.detail: Relative-value framing can hide broad market beta effects.
caveats.label: hypothesis_caveat

5925fc68-d47c-475f-a199-50d69615edf2.expected_direction: defensives outperform when the macro signal is interpreted as growth-negative
5925fc68-d47c-475f-a199-50d69615edf2.label: counterfactual
5925fc68-d47c-475f-a199-50d69615edf2.mechanism: Investors may interpret the macro signal as slower growth rather than lower discount rates.
5925fc68-d47c-475f-a199-50d69615edf2.novelty_usefulness_note: Useful falsification card that forces clearer interpretation.
5925fc68-d47c-475f-a199-50d69615edf2.thesis: If the primary thesis is wrong, defensive sectors should benefit more than growth-sensitive assets under the same macro shift.
5925fc68-d47c-475f-a199-50d69615edf2.title: Counterfactual defensive rotation

caveats.detail: Proxy selection may dominate the result.
caveats.label: hypothesis_caveat

caveats.detail: Macro releases require explicit publication-lag handling.
caveats.label: hypothesis_caveat

8c492101-c30b-40ed-9e66-fd551d26e8f4.expected_direction: direction depends on the sign of the macro move, but should be stable in the proposed specification
8c492101-c30b-40ed-9e66-fd551d26e8f4.label: primary
8c492101-c30b-40ed-9e66-fd551d26e8f4.mechanism: Changes in macro expectations alter discount rates and sector-relative earnings expectations.
8c492101-c30b-40ed-9e66-fd551d26e8f4.novelty_usefulness_note: Good default card for a first-pass quant investigation.
8c492101-c30b-40ed-9e66-fd551d26e8f4.thesis: Investigate semis versus defensives. through a measurable macro-to-market transmission channel.
8c492101-c30b-40ed-9e66-fd551d26e8f4.title: Primary macro transmission

caveats.detail: Regime definitions may be unstable or ex post.
caveats.label: hypothesis_caveat

caveats.label: hypothesis_caveat

e06c9404-f582-4820-9103-7113529b5192.expected_direction: stronger and cleaner directional effect within selected regimes
e06c9404-f582-4820-9103-7113529b5192.label: regime
e06c9404-f582-4820-9103-7113529b5192.mechanism: Transmission strength changes when inflation, policy, or recession risk dominates the narrative.
e06c9404-f582-4820-9103-7113529b5192.novelty_usefulness_note: High usefulness for separating unconditional noise from conditional signal.
e06c9404-f582-4820-9103-7113529b5192.thesis: The relationship should be stronger in specific macro regimes than in unconditional full-sample analysis.
e06c9404-f582-4820-9103-7113529b5192.title: Regime-conditional sensitivity
